nasb.text: ‘But if he pushed him suddenly without enmity, or threw something at him without lying in wait,

esv.text: “But if he pushed him suddenly without enmity, or hurled anything on him without lying in wait

cnv.text: “‘但是，如果人沒有仇恨，忽然把人推倒，或是無意向人投擲甚麼器皿，

ccb.text: “‘倘若有人并非怀恨而是偶然推倒人致死，或无意间扔东西砸人致死，
